name: Oval Table Lamp with Pleated Shade Red - Threshold™
description:
This Oval Table Lamp with Pleated Shade from Threshold™ is great for adding stylish illumination to any space in your home. Standing 15.5 inches high, this decorative table lamp features a white linen empire shade with a pleated design atop a brownish red oval ceramic base with white bottom and brass-finish neck and finial for a standout look. The convenient turn knob rotary switch offers dimmable and full-range light settings to create the perfect ambiance, and the five-foot cord allows for flexible placement.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
